# 🛡️ Security (250)

AI is now both the weapon and the shield, and this is where that arms race plays out in code. Find offensive agents that probe for holes, defensive tooling that catches them, and the safety research keeping models honest.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

## Red Team

Autonomous attackers that hunt vulnerabilities and exploit them before the bad guys do
